title: Is it possible to import a PDF file to create a New Doc in a Workspace?
excerpt: I would like to add a New Doc to a Workspace. I have a PDF, how can I import it to the New Doc form?

posts.author: DrGerry (Gerald)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to add a New Doc to a Workspace. I have a PDF, how can I import it to the New Doc form?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Gerald,

I have followed up with our team internally regarding this feature and it’s future development. I will update you as soon as I get a reply

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Gerald, thanks for your patience with me!

The product team have confirmed that at this time we don’t have concrete plans to implement this feature. I apologise for the inconvenience here, however will continue advocating for this feature and keep you in the loop regarding any future developments
